description_long: This object consists of a coordinated set of three outdoor lounge chairs, including a three-seater sofa flanked by two single armchairs. Each piece features a robust black metal frame with straight, geometric lines and open rectangular armrests. The seating and backrest areas are upholstered in a light, neutral-colored cushion, providing comfort and a modern aesthetic. The cushions appear to be thick and plush, with a smooth, fabric finish and subtle tufting details. The design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, patios, or communal outdoor spaces. The open frame construction allows for airflow and easy cleaning, while the armrests offer additional support for users.
description: A modern outdoor lounge set with a black metal frame and light cushioned seats, including a three-seater sofa and two armchairs. The design is minimalist, with open armrests and plush, neutral upholstery.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth and thickness of the cushions and the open rectangular armrests.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid black metal backs and the separation between the three seating units.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full seating arrangement, cushion details, and the inviting appearance of the set.
